MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT MARRIOTT HOTEL SERVICES INC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS OFF CALENDAR PER MOVING PARTY. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR # 5220 =301/PJB

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Independent Medical Examination Of Pltf In California
Off Calendar Sep-24-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Marriot Hotel Services's motion to compel the independent medical examination in California is granted. The examination shall be scheduled at a mutually convenient time and be completed no later than November 2, 2007. In addition to reasonable travel expenses, defendant shall pay and an additional $500 to counsel for plaintiff. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Notice Of Motion For Court Order Requiring Nonresident Pltf To Post An Undertaking
Off Calendar Mar-13-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES- ATTY. WALTER L. DAVIS, TEL. NO. (510) 888-9040 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. KAREN E. GIQUINTO OF LOMBARDI, LOPER & CONANT, TEL. NO. (510) 433-2600 FOR THE DEFENDANT MARRIOTT HOTEL SERVICES INC;

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS - DEFENDANT MARRIOTT HOTEL SERVICES INC. Motion For Court Order Requiring Nonresident Plaintiff To Post An Undertaking IS DENIED. GIVEN THE RELATIVE EVIDENTIARY SHOWINGS DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO CONVINCE THE COURT THAT RELIEF IS APPROPRIATE AT THIS STAGE OF THE PROCEEDINGS. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189
